svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="KSUJmidqIn6oZChvzIBP"> <mxGraphModel dx="1167" dy="866" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-1" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Start: calculatePrice()" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="213" x="244" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-2" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="orderLines empty?" vertex="1"> style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Return 0.0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="135" x="20" y="2228" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-4" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Initialize totalPrice = 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="216" x="346" y="252" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-5" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Check if weekend" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="186" x="361" y="356" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-6" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Loop through tickets" vertex="1"> style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Get ticket index i" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="178" x="282" y="564" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-8" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Get base price" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="164" x="289" y="668" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-9" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Initialize ticketPrice" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="196" x="273" y="772" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-10" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Is student OR not weekend?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="260" x="241" y="876" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-11" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Is 2nd ticket?
i+1 % 2 == 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="154" x="200" y="1028" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-12" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Set ticketPrice = 0" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="189" x="161" y="1180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-13" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Keep basePrice" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="173" x="400" y="1180" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-14" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Is ticket premium
AND price &gt; 0?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="181" x="281" y="1284" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-15" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Add premium surcharge
+2€ student
+3€ non-student" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="102" width="231" x="357" y="1436" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-16" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Add ticketPrice
to totalPrice" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="167" x="288" y="1588" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-17" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="More tickets?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="54" width="155" x="376" y="1716" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-18" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Is non-student AND
weekend AND &gt;= 6 tickets?" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="78" width="257" x="325" y="1844" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="T4OJMsxPgcxVMhGsk08h-19" parent="1" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=2;fillColor=light-dark(#eeeeee,#1f2020);strokeColor=light-dark(#999999,#cccccc);fontColor=light-dark(#333333,#cccccc);" value="Apply 10% discount
